## Description
Provide a concise overview of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` pass.
- [ ] Unit/Integration tests pass.
- [ ] `cargo miri test` passes (no undefined behavior).
- [ ] Concurrency changes verified with `loom` (if applicable).
